text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O and I are training outside, when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me... You're T.M. Opera O, aren't you? I'm
a huge fan!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well, now! You must have an eye for aesthetics!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall reward it with a special copy of my new
headshot I took just yesterday.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not a single one! Where could they have all
gone?!
choice_data_list: Didn't you just pass out a big stack of them?
Didn't you just pass out a big stack of them?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, what have I done?! That was the entire
stock?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry. Please, would you accept my
autograph for now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fan looks overjoyed to get an autograph, but
Opera O is in utter despair.
